Description: It maintains an Sick Leave (SL) and URTI balances, capturing both previous and updated values, along with eligibility context, leave year reference, and revocation status.
Central crew master table containing personal details, employment status, base, designation, experience, compliance dates, promotion history, and leave eligibility.
Stores current leave balance per crew, leave type, and leave year.
Master list of crew designations used across CLMS, LMS, PA, and UMS modules.
Defines leave year configuration, visibility, and administrative approval.
Defines leave types (SL, PL, URTI, etc.) and their display order.
Defines valid status codes for LMS transactions and processes.
Master table defining program/activity types and sub‑types.
Master table storing country reference data used across the User Management System for location and configuration purposes.
Stores station/base master data including codes, region, contact email, and operational classification.
Stores application user accounts with department and station mapping.
Tracks crew attrition events with reasons and dates.
Stores GNDcode transactions for crew members, including duty timings, approval status, and payability indicators.
Child table storing breakup of leave requests by leave type
This table captures leave quantities, balance impact, and applicable date ranges linked to a parent leave request, enabling accurate processing and reconciliation of special leave codes.
Master table for leave requests raised by crew.
This table captures the overall leave request context, including crew details, leave period, approval status, comments, and action history, and acts as the parent table for detailed leave records
Stores annual leave allocations per crew and leave year.
Maps crew to leave year transitions including base changes.
System‑calculated suggested sick leave allocations.
Stores special appreciation/award records for crew.

Flat, denormalized raw export combining crew identity, leave year/type configuration, leave balances and allocations, leave requests, scheduler SL/URTI balance updates, attrition, base transfers, and appreciation records into a single wide table (one row per leave/balance/ground-duty transaction).
